subject: Login page not loading on mobile Safari

messages.body: I can't log in on my iPhone. The page just spins.
We've identified this as a Safari WebKit issue. Fix deployed.
My CSV export is missing the 'Created Date' and 'Status' columns.
This was a regression in last week's release. Patch shipped today.

subject: How do I set up SSO?

messages.body: We want to configure SAML SSO for our team. Where do I start?
Head to Settings > Security > SSO. Here's our setup guide: docs.example.com/sso

subject: Dashboard loading slowly for large datasets

messages.body: Our analytics dashboard takes 30+ seconds with 100k records.
Engineering is aware and working on query optimization. ETA next week.

subject: Webhook not firing on status change

messages.body: Our webhook endpoint isn't getting called when a ticket status changes.
Found the issue — our event dispatcher was skipping status transitions to 'pending'. Fixed now.
Any plans for dark mode? Our team works late and the bright UI is tough.
Dark mode is on our Q2 roadmap. Added your vote to the feature request.

subject: API rate limit hit during batch import

messages.body: We're getting 429 errors during our nightly batch import of ~50k records.
Bumped your rate limit to 1000 req/min. Consider using our bulk import endpoint for large batches.
My team members aren't receiving 2FA codes via email.
Our email provider had a deliverability issue. Resolved — codes should arrive within 30 seconds now.
